# DANTREE CODEBASE_CONTEXT
**Version:** 2.1 | **Generated by:** Manus | **Date:** 2026-03-31
**Purpose:** Authoritative codebase map for Claude to prevent import path guessing.

---

## IMPORT PATH RULES

```
ALL server files are in the SAME directory: server/
Correct import pattern:  import { X } from "./filename"
Wrong import pattern:    import { X } from "../filename"
Wrong import pattern:    import { X } from "../../server/filename"
```

---

## PROTOCOL / AGGREGATION / SYNTHESIS FILES
These are the files Claude owns and can freely modify:

```
server/semantic_protocol.ts              → Level 12.1 — transport types + enforcement
server/semantic_protocol_integration.ts → Level 12.1 — PATH-A/B/C wrapper functions
server/semantic_aggregator.ts           → Level 12.2 — aggregation engine + UnifiedSemanticState
server/semantic_packet_builders.ts      → Level 12.3 — Level11 + PositionLayer packet builders
server/semantic_protocol.examples.ts   → Protocol usage examples
```

**Import examples (correct):**
```typescript
import { SemanticTransportPacket, SemanticDirection } from "./semantic_protocol";
import { aggregateSemanticPackets, buildSynthesisSemanticEnvelope } from "./semantic_aggregator";
import { buildLevel11SemanticPacket, buildPositionSemanticPacket } from "./semantic_packet_builders";
import { buildExperienceLayerSemanticPacket } from "./semantic_protocol_integration";
```

---

## READ-ONLY ENGINE FILES
These files must NOT be modified. Import types only.

```
server/level11MultiAssetEngine.ts   → Level 11 multi-asset engine
  exports: Level11AnalysisOutput, PropagationChainOutput, PropagationLink,
           DriverSignal, RealDriversOutput, AssetType, SentimentPhase

server/experienceLayer.ts           → Level 10.3 experience layer
  exports: ExperienceLayerOutput, ExperienceLayerInsight

server/level105PositionLayer.ts     → Level 10.5 position layer
  exports: PositionLayerOutput

server/deepResearchEngine.ts        → Deep research orchestrator
  exports: DeepResearchContextMap, runDeepResearch()

server/synthesisController.ts       → Synthesis controller
  exports: buildStructuredSynthesis(), formatStructuredSynthesisForPrompt(),
           formatSemanticEnvelopeForPrompt()

server/routers.ts                   → All tRPC procedures (append-only)
```

**Import examples (correct):**
```typescript
import type { Level11AnalysisOutput } from "./level11MultiAssetEngine";
import type { ExperienceLayerOutput } from "./experienceLayer";
import type { PositionLayerOutput } from "./level105PositionLayer";
```

---

## LLM / MODEL ROUTING FILES

```
server/model_router.ts    → modelRouter.generate() — unified LLM entry point (v2.0)
server/llmProviders.ts    → invokeWithModel() — DEPRECATED, delegates to modelRouter.generate()
server/_core/llm.ts       → invokeLLM() — Manus built-in LLM helper
```

**Import example:**
```typescript
import { modelRouter } from "./model_router";
// NOT: import { invokeWithModel } from "./llmProviders"; // deprecated
```

---

## DATABASE / STORAGE FILES

```
server/db.ts              → Query helpers (Drizzle ORM)
server/storage.ts         → S3 helpers (storagePut, storageGet)
drizzle/schema.ts         → Database schema (READ-ONLY unless migration included)
```

---

## HIGH-REFERENCE FILES (most frequently imported)

| File | Import Path | Primary Exports |
|------|-------------|-----------------|
| semantic_protocol.ts | `"./semantic_protocol"` | SemanticTransportPacket, SemanticDirection, SemanticTaskType |
| semantic_aggregator.ts | `"./semantic_aggregator"` | UnifiedSemanticState, aggregateSemanticPackets |
| semantic_packet_builders.ts | `"./semantic_packet_builders"` | buildLevel11SemanticPacket, buildPositionSemanticPacket |
| level11MultiAssetEngine.ts | `"./level11MultiAssetEngine"` | Level11AnalysisOutput, PropagationChainOutput |
| experienceLayer.ts | `"./experienceLayer"` | ExperienceLayerOutput, ExperienceLayerInsight |
| model_router.ts | `"./model_router"` | modelRouter, TaskType, RouterResponse |

---

## SERVER DIRECTORY — PROTOCOL LAYER FILES ONLY
(Full server/ has 100+ files — see above sections for complete list)

```
server/
├── semantic_protocol.ts              [Claude-owned] Level 12.1 core
├── semantic_protocol_integration.ts  [Claude-owned] Level 12.1 integration
├── semantic_aggregator.ts            [Claude-owned] Level 12.2 aggregation
├── semantic_packet_builders.ts       [Claude-owned] Level 12.3 builders
├── model_router.ts                   [Claude-owned] Model routing v2.0
├── level11MultiAssetEngine.ts        [READ-ONLY]    Level 11 engine
├── experienceLayer.ts                [READ-ONLY]    Level 10.3
├── level105PositionLayer.ts          [READ-ONLY]    Level 10.5
├── deepResearchEngine.ts             [READ-ONLY]    Deep research
├── synthesisController.ts            [READ-ONLY]    Synthesis
├── routers.ts                        [APPEND-ONLY]  tRPC procedures
├── danTreeSystem.ts                  [READ-ONLY]    DanTree orchestrator
└── db.ts                             [READ-ONLY]    DB helpers
```

---

## TSCONFIG NOTES
```
target: ES2020
module: CommonJS
strict: true
Set iteration: use Array.from(set) NOT for...of Set directly (TS2802 error)
```

---

  Status: PARTIAL — builder exists, aggregation at runDeepResearch() level pending
  Blocker: level11Analysis not in DeepResearchContextMap (OI-L12-003-A)

  Status: ACTIVE — included in runDeepResearch() aggregation boundary

PATH-C (PositionLayer → packet):
  Builder: buildPositionSemanticPacket() ← server/semantic_packet_builders.ts
  Status: ACTIVE — included in runDeepResearch() aggregation boundary
